scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && python -m uvicorn app.main:create_app --factory --reload --reload-dir app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && cross-env DESKTOP_BUILD=true NEXT_PUBLIC_DESKTOP_BUILD=true npm run build
scripts.build:desktop: npm run sync:desktop-meta && cd desktop-tauri && cargo tauri build
